banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock applicant: Anna Marie Fischer, a German citizen with her primary (Haupt-) residence registered in Berlin, renewing an existing Reisepass in person at a Bürgeramt. She has held a German passport before, her personal data matches the population register, she was not recently naturalised, and she is an adult applying for herself — so no guardian or extra evidence-of-status documents apply. She chose the standard 32-page passport, standard (non-express) processing, a photo pre-taken at a certified studio, and pickup at the citizen office rather than postal delivery. All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real applicant's information.

eligibilityOutcome.summary: Eligible to apply: a German citizen, which is the sole eligibility gate this document models for the Reisepass service.

reasons.requirement: Must be a German citizen (PassG §1 Abs. 1)

safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (de/bmi/passport-application). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to any Bürgeramt/Passbehörde or other government system. A human (the applicant, or a guardian for a minor applicant) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, and attend the in-person appointment themselves with the original supporting documents before this application can proceed. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
